text.title: Django Testing with pytest Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the code artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

section.title: Schema

example.code: { "uses_pytest_style": true, "uses_factory_boy": true, "uses_parametrize": true, "shallow_mocks_ok": true, "human_in_loop": true, "mutation_tested": true, "test_count": 17 }

example.note: unittest.TestCase style; raw ORM creates; sequence-named duplicate tests.

pattern.why: Violates pytest-function-style; doesn't compose with pytest fixtures.
Violates factory-boy-not-raw-orm; breaks on model evolution.

pattern.description: def test_create_1 + def test_create_2 differing only in input
assert True at end of test body to satisfy coverage
